name: 👊🏻Punch Out - Fists of Reckoning
description:
"Okay, suckers, you've taken yer best shot! NOW IT'S MY TURN!"—Punch Out

In the heart of Scotland, where crime festers in the shadows and justice is often too slow, one woman is about to change the rules—by breaking every single one of them.

Sonya Williams was just another street-smart, rough-and-tumble biker until a catastrophic accident turned her into something more. After surviving a deadly collision with a truck carrying volatile chemicals, her body was transformed—her bones now unbreakable titanium, her strength limitless, her stamina nearly endless. But with great power comes… well, an unshakable urge to knock criminals through walls.

Now, as the masked vigilante Punch Out, she delivers justice with her fists—one devastating blow at a time. Whether it’s stopping arms dealers, dismantling drug rings, or sending mob bosses through their own office windows, Sonya does it all with a cocky grin, a rebellious attitude, and a knack for collateral damage.

As danger escalates and evil forces threaten innocent lives—Sonya finds herself in the fight of her life. With her team, the Guard of Justice, rallying behind her and the city’s fate hanging in the balance, Punch Out must push herself beyond her limits. Can she punch her way through an entire army of criminals, or will she finally meet the one enemy she can’t break?

Packed with high-octane action, razor-sharp humor, and enough earth-shattering punches to make physics question itself, this tale is the ultimate adrenaline-fueled superhero ride. Buckle up, because justice is about to hit harder than ever.

——————————————————————————————————————————

Superhero Saga:

Quantum Trail - Flash of Hope
creator: Noneless
